page.title: Payments
page.description: Review billing periods, statuses, and payment details for managed contracts.

states.emptyDescription: Try adjusting the filters to find matching payment records.
states.loadErrorTitle: We could not load the payments

errors.unauthorized: Your session no longer allows loading payments. Sign in again and try once more.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view these payments.
errors.notFound: We could not find the requested payment record.
errors.server: We had a server issue while loading payments. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.network: The connection appears to have been interrupted. Check your internet and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected issue occurred while loading payments.

detail.title: Payment detail
detail.description: Review the complete payment record for this contract movement.
detail.loadErrorTitle: We could not load the payment detail

checkout.title: Secure payment gateway
checkout.description: Pay securely and instantly using MercadoPago Transparent Checkout.
checkout.oxxoLimit: OXXO (Cash) payments have a maximum limit of $10,000.00 MXN. For higher amounts, use a credit or debit card.
checkout.cardholderPlaceholder: Enter it as it appears on the card
checkout.oxxoInstructions: Show this QR code or provide the following reference at the counter to pay at any OXXO.
checkout.existingOxxoInstructions: This reference was already generated. Show this QR code or provide the following reference at the counter to pay at any OXXO.

messages.cardSuccess: The payment has been processed and approved successfully.
messages.pending: The payment is being verified by the payment gateway.
